_folding_note: Intentionally NO folding.markers. VS Code renders folding REGION markers as minimap section headers (editor.minimap.showRegionSectionHeaders, on by default), drawing the matched declaration lines as LARGE text in the scroll minimap — the 'type/entity/database/fn/auth/handler look huge in the minimap' bug. Regions are meant for user-delimited blocks (#region), not every declaration. Folding still works via indentation rules + bracket pairs.
